name: Fiendish Portrait
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>幻魔の肖像</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>デビルズ・ポートレイト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; Special Summon 1 monster with that name from your Deck or Extra Deck, but shuffle it into the Deck during the End Phase of the next turn, also you cannot Special Summon monsters from the Deck or Extra Deck for the rest of this turn after this card resolves. You can only activate 1 "Fiendish Portrait" per turn.
eff: Target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; Special Summon 1 monster with that name from your Deck or Extra Deck, but shuffle it into the Deck during the End Phase of the next turn, also you cannot Special Summon monsters from the Deck or Extra Deck for the rest of this turn after this card resolves. You can only activate 1 "Fiendish Portrait" per turn.

action: Returns from field to Extra Deck
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
Prevents the player's Special Summons from the Deck
Prevents the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
